Paragraph.Sentence: The first four terms of an arithmetic sequence are given below. Choose the algebraic expression that represents the nth term in this sequence.

response.feedback: Right! The expression you selected, -9n - 1, is correct.
The student got this item correct.
Sorry, the expression you selected, 9n - 10, is incorrect. The sequence in the question is: -10, -19, -28, -37,... But the expression you selected describes the sequence: -1, 8, 17, 26,...
